goals.title: Clean up the local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt...
goals.objective: Clean up the local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt-brain so the supported source-code surface is indexed consistently. Baseline evidence shows .codegraph is live and indexes 1245 files, but three tracked Python files under trustgraph-vertexai/trustgraph/model/text_completion/vertexai are missing. Diagnose and repair the local codegraph setup without committing the codegraph database. Prove with CLI/data evidence that supported Python/YAML/JS candidates match the codegraph files table, core debt-brain symbols resolve through codegraph, there are zero indexing errors, cleanup receipts are recorded, and any durable repo docs or scripts are committed and pushed if changed.

goals.title: Clean up the local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt...
goals.objective: Clean up the local Codegraph indexing for /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt-brain so the supported source-code surface is indexed consistently. Baseline evidence shows .codegraph is live and indexes 1245 files, but three tracked Python files under trustgraph-vertexai/trustgraph/model/text_completion/vertexai are missing. Diagnose and repair the local codegraph setup without committing the codegraph database. Prove with CLI/data evidence that supported Python/YAML/JS candidates match the codegraph files table, core debt-brain symbols resolve through codegraph, there are zero indexing errors, cleanup receipts are recorded, and any durable repo docs or scripts are committed and pushed if changed.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/data surface: run a repo-vs-codegraph source coverage check that lists tracked Python/YAML/JS files, compares them with sqlite .codegraph/codegraph.db files, and prints SOURCE_COVERAGE_OK only when missing=0, extra=0, indexed_errors=0.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/source-coverage.txt containing SOURCE_COVERAGE_OK missing=0 extra=0 indexed_errors=0.

successCriteria.scenario: Codegraph MCP real surface: query the formerly missing vertexai file and a core debt-brain workflow symbol through codegraph; PASS iff vertexai/llm.py resolves as an indexed file and evaluate_claim_domain_decision / evaluate_workflow_judgment still resolve through codegraph.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/codegraph-real-surface.txt containing CODEGRAPH_REAL_SURFACE_OK vertexai=yes debt_brain=yes.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/git cleanup surface: verify .codegraph remains ignored/local-only, git status has no uncommitted tracked product files after any durable doc/script change, cleanup receipts exist, and any git-tracked durable changes are committed and pushed.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/codegraph-index-cleanup-20260708/final-cleanup.txt containing CODEGRAPH_CLEANUP_OK and commit/push hash if tracked files changed, or NO_GIT_CHANGE_REQUIRED if none changed.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Make CodeGraph indexing clean for the full supported source surface of /Users/slit/dev/recova-debt-brain.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Future AI maintenance can use CodeGraph with no supported tracked source files missing, no index errors, queryable vertexai provider files, queryable core debt-brain symbols, and local-only database state.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The broad vertexai ignore rule was narrowed, CodeGraph now indexes 1,248 supported files with zero missing/extra/error rows, real symbol queries pass, and durable repo changes were committed and pushed.
